honor.description: Drengskapr: Nobility of character. Doing the right thing even when difficult. Upholding one's reputation through action.

loyalty.description: Troth: Unwavering allegiance to kin, friends, and sworn partners. Betrayal is the ultimate sin.

authenticity.description: Living truthfully without masks. Rejecting performative social norms in favor of genuine expression.

hospitality.description: Generosity to guests and strangers. Sharing wealth, food, and wisdom freely.

frith.description: Peace and social order within the Innangarð (inner circle). Protecting the sanctity of the home and relationships.

courage.description: Mod: Bravery in the face of fear. Willingness to take risks for growth or protection.

independence.description: Self-reliance. The ability to stand alone and care for oneself.

wisdom.description: Seeking knowledge (Huginn) and understanding (Muninn). Valuing experience over dogma.

ancestral_reverence.description: Honoring the lineage of blood and spirit. Remembering those who came before.

playfulness.description: Joy in living. Humor, teasing, and not taking oneself too seriously. Laughter is sacred.

deceit.description: Lying or breaking one's word (Oathbreaking). Highly dishonorable.

cowardice.description: Fleeing from necessary conflict or responsibility.

cruelty.description: Harming the innocent or vulnerable without cause. Violates Frith.

betrayal.description: Turning against one's kin or sworn allies.
